evals.name: pricing-proposal-contrast
evals.prompt: Restructure this pricing proposal so the comparison is clear and not misleading.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.

evals.name: meaningful-reason-request
evals.prompt: Improve this request by adding a meaningful reason, not filler.
evals.expected_output: Identifies relevant Influence principle, checks evidence, flags ethical risks, and provides concrete recommendations or rewrites without inventing proof.
